---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a brand new marketing skill
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: new-skill
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name

What would this skill be called? (use kebab-case, e.g. `email-sequence`)

## Trigger Phrases

When should an agent activate this skill? List the phrases or intents that should trigger it.

## Problem It Solves

What marketing task does this skill help with? Why does this need to exist as its own skill rather than being part of an existing one?

## What the Skill Should Do

Describe the workflow step by step. What questions should the agent ask? What frameworks should it apply? What output should it produce?

## Related Existing Skills

Which existing skills would this link to or complement?

## References and Frameworks

Any specific frameworks, methodologies, or resources the skill should be based on?
